economic_notes: First Nation operates a store enterprise, cattle ranching (155 animals - cows and bulls), limited partnerships in development and property, and government business enterprises in development and land holding. Treaty Land Entitlement revenue account consolidated. Multiple CMHC housing phases financed.
notes: Financial statements are for fiscal year ended March 31, 2021, not 2024. Comparative 2020 figures restated due to adoption of Section 3041 Agriculture under ASPE (change in accounting for biological assets). Prior year audit conducted by a different auditor. Five entities fully consolidated including store enterprise, CMHC housing fund, TLE revenue account, and land holding corporation. Three LPs and three GBEs accounted for under modified equity method. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + PAGC + First Nations Trust + CMHC Subsidy + Ottawa Trust + SIIT + Northern Lights = 28142877+782238+654888+470658+405778+248890+70572 = 30774901. OSR includes store sales, other revenue, rental income, TLE revenue, LP earnings, GBE earnings, less deferral of unexpended funding.
